raw_trade.description: Binary event contract on German federal election outcome. Pays USD 1.00 per contract if AfD achieves over 30 percent vote share in the 2025 Bundestagswahl.
raw_trade.underlying_economic_exposure: German renewable energy subsidy regime materially affected by election outcome

upi_result.explanation: EventContract / prediction market contracts are outside the current ANNA-DSB OTC product taxonomy. The DSB UPI library covers conventional Rates, Credit, Foreign_Exchange, Equity, Commodities, and Other OTC templates, but it does not provide an EventContract template for binary political, macro, or regulatory outcomes.
upi_result.classification_note: Instrument type 'BinaryEventContract' under asset class 'EventContract' has no product definition in the ANNA-DSB UPI library. This reflects the current regulatory classification of prediction and event contracts as outside the OTC derivatives taxonomy in most jurisdictions. Refer to Module 4 for classification analysis.

warnings: upi: Event contract may be reportable on a CFTC-regulated DCM, but no ANNA-DSB UPI product definition exists.
CFTC.note: Kalshi/CFTC DCM event contract. Reporting may apply, but the current UPI taxonomy does not support binary event contracts.

EMIR.note: Event contracts are treated as outside EMIR OTC derivative reporting scope under the gambling/outside-taxonomy classification used here.

raw_trade.description: Binary event contract paying USD 1.00 if US CPI inflation (all items, 12 month) exceeds 3.0 percent in Q3 2026 as reported by BLS.
raw_trade.event_description: US CPI YoY >= 3.0% for Q3 2026 (BLS release)
raw_trade.underlying_economic_exposure: EU asset manager with USD denominated bond portfolio with inflation sensitivity

upi_result.explanation: EventContract / prediction market contracts are outside the current ANNA-DSB OTC product taxonomy. The DSB UPI library covers conventional Rates, Credit, Foreign_Exchange, Equity, Commodities, and Other OTC templates, but it does not provide an EventContract template for binary political, macro, or regulatory outcomes.
upi_result.classification_note: Instrument type 'BinaryEventContract' under asset class 'EventContract' has no product definition in the ANNA-DSB UPI library.
